instruction: Classify the traveler's request into a booking intent.
baseline_prompt: You are a travel-booking assistant. Classify the traveler's request into a booking intent. Classify into one of these categories: flight, hotel, car_rental, cancellation, itinerary, loyalty.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: I want to upgrade my seat to business class for the transatlantic portion if it's not too expensive.
What are my options for extended stay accommodations in Boston? I'll be there for work for about three weeks starting next month.
Do you have any electric or hybrid options available for a week-long reservation in San Francisco starting next Tuesday?
My doctor advised against traveling due to a medical condition, so I need to undo all my reservations and see about getting my payment returned.
Please display my complete travel schedule including all transportation and accommodations for next month's business trip.
I just completed a stay last week but the nights haven't posted to my profile yet - usually it's automatic within a few days
Can you search for availability from New York JFK to Los Angeles LAX next Wednesday? I need to be there by noon.
Looking for an all-inclusive resort in Punta Cana with good reviews, planning a week-long vacation in December.
Need something with 4-wheel drive for mountain roads - pickup at Aspen, keeping it for 5 days in late January
Our connecting destination just issued new visa requirements that we can't meet in time, so we need to pull out of this trip and request our funds back.
Could you pull up my travel plans for the conference in Austin? I want to see everything I have booked.
My friend referred me to sign up - how do we both get the bonus that was advertised?
I'd like to book passage for my family of four traveling from Atlanta to Orlando during spring break in April.
Looking for a beachfront resort in Cancun for our anniversary, something romantic with ocean views and a spa.
Can you check availability for an economy class vehicle at Orlando International? My dates are June 12-19 and I want automatic transmission

test.query: I need to get my money back for the reservation I made last week because our plans have changed and we can't go anymore.
Show me a summary of all the reservations I have for my Tokyo trip in April.
Is there a way to transfer some of my rewards to my spouse's account for an upcoming trip they're planning?
What's available for a round trip between Chicago and Miami over the Memorial Day weekend? Looking for economy class.
Can you find me accommodation near Times Square with a king bed? My budget is around $200 per night.
Looking for the cheapest compact option to drive around Miami Beach during my stay there, picking up on the 3rd and returning on the 10th
My passport renewal got delayed and won't arrive in time, so I have no choice but to abandon these travel plans. Please help me get reimbursed.
Can you show me all my upcoming trips for the next three months? I need to review the details.
What tier level am I currently at and how many more flights do I need to reach the next one?
My current reservation has me arriving too late for my meeting. Is there an earlier option on the same day?
I'd like to modify my reservation at the Marriott in Chicago to add an extra night at the end of my stay.
I'd like to arrange ground transportation for my business trip - specifically a mid-size sedan from the airport to use for three days
We had a family emergency and need to back out of our vacation plans. What's the process for getting a refund on everything we booked?
Can I see the full breakdown of my multi-city trip? I need to forward it to my colleague.
I'm trying to understand the benefits that come with my current membership level, especially regarding upgrades and lounge access
Looking for the cheapest way to get to Tokyo from San Francisco sometime in October, flexible on dates.
I booked a room for the wrong dates. Can you change my reservation from April 10-12 to April 17-19 at the same property?
I need to reserve a vehicle for pickup at LAX airport next Friday morning and drop it off at the same location on Sunday evening
I just found out my sister is getting married that same weekend, so I need to scrap these plans immediately and hopefully recover some of the money I spent.
I'd like to add a dinner reservation to my existing trip to Barcelona next week.
I'd like to know if my recent stays at your properties have been credited to my account yet, as I don't see them reflected in my total
Can you help me find a direct route from London Heathrow to Dubai for two passengers departing March 15th?
Need a pet-friendly place in San Francisco, ideally in the Mission District area, for five nights in October.
I need a pickup truck for moving some equipment during my stay in Austin, from the 20th to the 25th of this month
